## Source: amazon-inspector (40ebc0b0ce3b008449dfcb8149458898f7bbbffbac1a58a1ac3f5e002585b45c)
The package iosysredis was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (43fc017a325092b04890a7331cb0cc67d4306e95b2d62cda94322452b70d9cd6)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'iosysredis' @ 5.13.2 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
